evals.prompt: Create a new report document with title 'Annual Report 2023' and author 'John Doe'.
evals.expected_output: A new DOCX document named 'Annual Report 2023.docx' is created with the specified title and author.
assertions: The document contains the title 'Annual Report 2023'
The document contains the author 'John Doe'

evals.prompt: Edit the content of 'example.docx' by replacing all occurrences of 'old text' with 'new text'.
evals.expected_output: The content of 'example.docx' is edited, replacing all occurrences of 'old text' with 'new text'.
assertions: All occurrences of 'old text' are replaced with 'new text'

evals.prompt: Apply the 'ModernCorporate' template to 'source.docx' and save as 'output.docx'.
evals.expected_output: The 'source.docx' is formatted using the 'ModernCorporate' template and saved as 'output.docx'.
assertions: The document follows the 'ModernCorporate' template styles

evals.prompt: Create a new document and add a section with a table containing 3 columns and 2 rows.
evals.expected_output: A new DOCX document is created with a section containing a table with 3 columns and 2 rows.
assertions: The document contains a table with 3 columns and 2 rows

evals.prompt: Fill in placeholders in 'template.docx' using the data {"name": "Jane Doe", "age": "30"}.
evals.expected_output: The placeholders in 'template.docx' are filled using the provided data.
assertions: The placeholders are replaced with the provided data
